clusters.title: Missing regression test for empty KillTimer timeout callback

member_findings.title: Missing regression test for empty KillTimer timeout callback
member_findings.impact: This bug fix changes the timeout path for the default-constructed empty callback, but the diff adds no test that would fail on the old code. A future refactor could remove the guard and reintroduce std::bad_function_call termination before the intended abort without CI catching it.
member_findings.fix: Add a focused death test for KillTimer constructed without a callback and a very short timeout, asserting the process reaches the intended abort path rather than throwing std::bad_function_call; keep or add a non-empty-callback death test to cover callback invocation before abort.
